title: Trigger inserts duplicate value in UNIQUE column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_tr0 AFTER DELETE ON fuzz_t0 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_t0(c0) VALUES(0);
INSERT INTO fuzz_t0(c0) VALUES(0), (0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c0=c0;
key_bug_features: Trigger inserts duplicate value in UNIQUE column
